0.content:
# Palo Alto Firewall Traffic Analysis

Real-time visibility into Palo Alto PAN-OS traffic logs. Logs are generated by the **Palo Alto Firewall Log Generator** workflow every 5 minutes with a mix of ~60% allowed and ~40% blocked traffic.

`log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"`

1.title: 1. All Firewall Logs — Overview
1.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| fields timestamp,
         paloalto.action,
         paloalto.src,
         paloalto.dst,
         paloalto.app,
         paloalto.rule,
         paloalto.from_zone,
         paloalto.to_zone,
         paloalto.dport,
         paloalto.bytes_sent,
         paloalto.bytes_received,
         paloalto.session_end_reason,
         paloalto.device_name
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 100

2.title: 2. Blocked Traffic Only
2.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| filter paloalto.action != "allow"
| fields timestamp,
         paloalto.action,
         paloalto.src,
         paloalto.dst,
         paloalto.app,
         paloalto.rule,
         paloalto.dport,
         paloalto.from_zone,
         paloalto.to_zone,
         paloalto.session_end_reason
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 100

3.title: 3. Allowed Traffic Only
3.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| filter paloalto.action == "allow"
| fields timestamp,
         paloalto.action,
         paloalto.src,
         paloalto.dst,
         paloalto.app,
         paloalto.rule,
         paloalto.dport,
         paloalto.bytes_sent,
         paloalto.bytes_received
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 100

4.title: 4. Traffic Summary — Allow vs Block
4.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| fieldsAdd is_blocked = paloalto.action != "allow"
| summarize total = count(),
            allowed = countIf(NOT is_blocked),
            blocked = countIf(is_blocked)
| fieldsAdd allowed_pct = round(toDouble(allowed) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 1),
            blocked_pct = round(toDouble(blocked) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 1)

5.title: 5. Blocked by Firewall Rule
5.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| filter paloalto.action != "allow"
| summarize block_count = count(),
            unique_sources = countDistinct(paloalto.src),
            unique_apps = countDistinct(paloalto.app),
            by: { paloalto.rule }
| sort block_count desc

6.title: 6. Blocked by Application
6.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| filter paloalto.action != "allow"
| summarize block_count = count(),
            deny_actions = collectDistinct(paloalto.action),
            rules_triggered = collectDistinct(paloalto.rule),
            by: { paloalto.app }
| sort block_count desc

7.title: 7. Blocked by Action Type
7.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| filter paloalto.action != "allow"
| summarize count = count(),
            by: { paloalto.action }
| sort count desc

8.title: 8. Zone Pair Analysis
8.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| summarize total = count(),
            allowed = countIf(paloalto.action == "allow"),
            blocked = countIf(paloalto.action != "allow"),
            by: { paloalto.from_zone, paloalto.to_zone }
| fieldsAdd block_rate = round(toDouble(blocked) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 1)
| sort block_rate desc

9.title: 9. Top Blocked Destinations
9.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| filter paloalto.action != "allow"
| summarize block_count = count(),
            attacking_sources = countDistinct(paloalto.src),
            apps_targeted = collectDistinct(paloalto.app),
            ports_targeted = collectDistinct(paloalto.dport),
            by: { paloalto.dst }
| sort block_count desc
| limit 20

10.title: 10. Top Blocked Sources
10.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| filter paloalto.action != "allow"
| summarize block_count = count(),
            targets = countDistinct(paloalto.dst),
            rules_hit = collectDistinct(paloalto.rule),
            by: { paloalto.src }
| sort block_count desc
| limit 20

11.title: 11. Blocked Traffic Over Time
11.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| fieldsAdd is_blocked = paloalto.action != "allow"
| makeTimeseries allowed = countIf(NOT is_blocked),
                 blocked = countIf(is_blocked),
                 interval: 5m

12.title: 12. High-Risk Port Blocks
12.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| filter paloalto.action != "allow"
| filter paloalto.dport == 3389
     OR paloalto.dport == 1433
     OR paloalto.dport == 3306
     OR paloalto.dport == 21
     OR paloalto.dport == 4444
| fields timestamp,
         paloalto.src,
         paloalto.dst,
         paloalto.dport,
         paloalto.app,
         paloalto.action,
         paloalto.rule,
         paloalto.session_end_reason
| sort timestamp desc

13.title: 13. Session End Reason Breakdown
13.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| summarize count = count(),
            by: { paloalto.session_end_reason, paloalto.action }
| sort count desc

14.title: 14. Bandwidth by Application
14.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "palo-alto-firewall"
| filter paloalto.action == "allow"
| summarize total_bytes_sent = sum(paloalto.bytes_sent),
            total_bytes_received = sum(paloalto.bytes_received),
            session_count = count(),
            by: { paloalto.app }
| fieldsAdd total_bytes = total_bytes_sent + total_bytes_received
| sort total_bytes desc
